extortion.description: 🔥"Doctorim" ,in Hebrew "דוקתורים" ,is the online medical site in Israel which attacked by Malek teambased on this successful cyber attack, we have the information of more than 1,200,000 persons and companions ☠️information includes: ☠️🩸 verified names🩸 verified identity numbers,🩸 verified contact numbers🩸 verified emails & phones🩸 & etc ...🧨⚠️and we destroyed all data⚠️🧨 MALEK TEAM has everything 🔪🩸
